Note: Noon: Charleston, South Carolina. His baro looks suspicious. It might be 29.82, but I left it as written.

Other: 2230: At 10:30 PM observed a total eclipse of the moon. The eclipse commenced at 9:20, covered the whole disc of the moon at 10:30 and terminated at 1:30 A.M. 2230: At 10:30 PM observed a total eclipse of the moon.
